quick_skim.title: Denoising ICF Images with Multiplicative Uniform Noise: A Self-Supervised Study Based on the Log-Domain Noisier2Inverse Framework
quick_skim.abstract: This paper documents the implementation and evaluation of a self-supervised denoising framework on Inertial Confinement Fusion (ICF) images corrupted by Multiplicative Uniform noise: the \emph{Log-Domain Noisier2Inverse} framework. This framework is developed and analysed in this work; the key theoretical result -- that minimising the log-domain self-supervised loss is equivalent to supervised learning in the transformed domain -- is presented with full proof. We document significant implementation challenges arising from the unique characteristics of ICF imagery, describe the fixes applied at each stage, and report final quantitative results. The log-domain approach with per-image JSON Uniform noise loading (Variant~B) achieves the best result: a mean PSNR of $21.41\db$ and SSIM of $0.8358$, a $+19.46\db$ improvement over the noisy input baseline of $1.95\db$, substantially outperforming BM3D log-domain ($4.47\db$, SSIM $0.5181$) and Noise2Self ($4.75\db$, SSIM $0.0177$). Variant~A, using fixed Gaussian noise loading, achieves $21.39\db$ PSNR and SSIM $0.8436$. Of the three evaluated methods, Log-Domain Noisier2Inverse and Noise2Self are entirely self-supervised during training, requiring no clean ground truth data; BM3D is a classical filter-based method requiring no training at all. The clean reference images are used solely for quantitative evaluation of all three methods.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: self-supervised denoising framework for images with multiplicative noise
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 自监督去噪框架，适用于乘法均匀噪声
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 自监督去噪框架，适用于乘法均匀噪声
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 自监督去噪框架，适用于乘法均匀噪声
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: This work proposes a self-supervised denoising framework for ICF images corrupted by multiplicative uniform noise, using log-domain Noisier2Inverse. It proves that minimizing the self-supervised loss is equivalent to supervised learning in the transformed domain.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文针对惯性约束聚变图像中特有的乘法均匀噪声，提出了一种基于对数域的自监督去噪框架Noisier2Inverse。核心理论证明在对数变换域中最小化自监督损失等价于监督学习，为自监督去噪提供了理论依据。针对ICF图像的特点解决了实施中的关键挑战，并报告了定量结果，展示了该框架在特殊噪声类型下的有效性，为自监督去噪方法的推广提供了新思路。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文针对惯性约束聚变图像中特有的乘法均匀噪声，提出了一种基于对数域的自监督去噪框架Noisier2Inverse。核心理论证明在对数变换域中最小化自监督损失等价于监督学习，为自监督去噪提供了理论依据。针对ICF图像的特点解决了实施中的关键挑战，并报告了定量结果，展示了该框架在特殊噪声类型下的有效性，为自监督去噪方法的推广提供了新思路。

quick_skim.title: Spectral DiffuserScope: a compact snapshot hyperspectral microscope
quick_skim.abstract: Hyperspectral fluorescence microscopy enables important biological and clinical applications, but conventional systems are bulky or require scanning, limiting temporal resolution and throughput. We introduce a computational snapshot hyperspectral microscope that uses compressed sensing to achieve higher spatial-spectral resolution than traditional snapshot systems. Our device is compact (~15 cm x 6 cm x 6 cm) and easily attaches to standard fluorescence microscopes. We benchmark our system against existing snapshot methods through simulations to evaluate its spatial and spectral performance. Experimental imaging of fluorescent beads, labeled cells, and lanthanide hydrogel beads demonstrates a practical, high-throughput solution for hyperspectral microscopy in biological and clinical applications.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: This paper presents a compact snapshot hyperspectral microscope using compressed sensing to achieve high spatial-spectral resolution with a small form factor. It demonstrates practical imaging of fluorescent beads and labeled cells.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文提出了一种紧凑型快照高光谱显微镜，采用压缩感知技术在单次曝光中获取完整的高光谱数据立方体，克服了传统扫描式系统体积庞大、时间分辨率低的缺点。通过优化的光谱编码策略，在约15厘米x6厘米x6厘米的小型化设备上实现了高空间-光谱分辨率。模拟和实验证明，该系统在荧光珠、标记细胞和镧系水凝胶珠的高光谱成像中表现出色，为高吞吐量的生物医学高光谱成像提供了实用方案。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文提出了一种紧凑型快照高光谱显微镜，采用压缩感知技术在单次曝光中获取完整的高光谱数据立方体，克服了传统扫描式系统体积庞大、时间分辨率低的缺点。通过优化的光谱编码策略，在约15厘米x6厘米x6厘米的小型化设备上实现了高空间-光谱分辨率。模拟和实验证明，该系统在荧光珠、标记细胞和镧系水凝胶珠的高光谱成像中表现出色，为高吞吐量的生物医学高光谱成像提供了实用方案。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Papers central to 高光谱影像噪声去除, especially work that connects or combines: low-rank representation for denoising; stripe noise removal in hyperspectral remote sensing images; high-dimensional tensor data recovery for hyperspectral images; relative radiometric correction for remote sensing images; hyperspectral image denoising methods; spectral-spatial denoising for hyperspectral images; hyperspectral image denoising using deep neural networks; state of the art hyperspectral image restoration and denoising methods; hyperspectral image stripe noise removal using deep learning; tensor based approaches for hyperspectral image anomaly detection and restoration.

quick_skim.title: MG-SpaIR: Multi-grade Sparse-guided Implicit Representation for Training-Data-Free Image Restoration
quick_skim.abstract: MG-SpaIR is a training-data-free framework for restoring a clean image from a single observation corrupted by a mixture of blur, downsampling, noise, and missing pixels. Building on implicit neural representations (INRs), we introduce a multi-grade coarse-to-fine residual hierarchy that progressively refines the reconstruction across resolution grades, improving representational fidelity and mitigating spectral limitations. To stabilize reconstruction optimization and suppress INR-induced artifacts, we further propose an explicit sparse proximal regularization (e.g., $\ell_0$-type) applied directly in the high-resolution image domain, which discourages spurious high-frequency patterns while preserving sharp structures. The resulting optimization is solved efficiently via a multi-grade proximal alternating scheme, and we establish convergence guarantees for the associated updates under standard regularity conditions. Experiments on mixed-degradation benchmarks demonstrate that MG-SpaIR consistently outperforms strong training-data-free baselines such as Deep Image Prior, providing a stable, interpretable, and data-efficient alternative to conventional learning-based restoration methods.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: training-data-free image restoration method handling noise
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 无训练数据图像恢复方法，处理噪声
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 无训练数据图像恢复方法，处理噪声
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 无训练数据图像恢复方法，处理噪声
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: MG-SpaIR proposes a training-data-free framework for restoring images corrupted by blur, downsampling, noise, and missing pixels using multi-grade implicit representations and sparse regularization.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: MG-SpaIR提出一种无训练数据框架，用于恢复受到模糊、下采样、噪声和缺失像素污染的图像。该方法采用多级粗到细残差层次结构，利用隐式神经表示，并通过显式稀疏正则化抑制伪影。实验表明该方法在多种退化组合下能有效重建清晰图像，为图像恢复提供了一种无需训练数据的通用方案。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: MG-SpaIR提出一种无训练数据框架，用于恢复受到模糊、下采样、噪声和缺失像素污染的图像。该方法采用多级粗到细残差层次结构，利用隐式神经表示，并通过显式稀疏正则化抑制伪影。实验表明该方法在多种退化组合下能有效重建清晰图像，为图像恢复提供了一种无需训练数据的通用方案。

quick_skim.title: Plug-and-Play Volumetric Reconstruction for Compressive Sensing Light-Sheet Microscopy
quick_skim.abstract: We investigate volumetric reconstruction for compressive sensing light-sheet microscopy (CS-LSM), where fast volumetric imaging is achieved by encoding multiple axial planes into each camera exposure. To recover the underlying volume from highly multiplexed measurements, we propose a plug-and-play (PnP) framework that flexibly incorporates any user-specified denoiser into the reconstruction process. Building on a slice-based formulation, we further introduce an axial-coupled model that exploits correlations between adjacent slices to improve volumetric continuity. For efficient computation, we derive a Woodbury-based update for the data-consistency step in both the slice-based and axial-coupled formulations, and employ a Gauss-Seidel sweep for the denoising step in the axial-coupled model. Under a weakly convex regularization assumption, we establish subsequential convergence of the proposed algorithm. Experiments on synthetic and real zebrafish-heart data demonstrate that the proposed framework successfully recovers cellular structures from compressed measurements, and provide practical insights into the comparative performance of commonly used denoisers within the PnP framework under the CS-LSM setup.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: plug-and-play denoising framework transferable to hyperspectral image reconstruction
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 即插即用去噪框架可迁移至高光谱图像重建
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 即插即用去噪框架可迁移至高光谱图像重建
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 即插即用去噪框架可迁移至高光谱图像重建
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a plug-and-play framework for volumetric reconstruction that flexibly incorporates any denoiser, applicable as a methodological bridge to hyperspectral image denoising.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文针对压缩传感光片显微镜中的体积重建问题，提出了一种即插即用框架，可灵活集成任意去噪器，并且通过轴向耦合模型利用切片间相关性。虽然应用领域不同，但该框架作为通用的图像/体积重建去噪方法，在方法论上可直接迁移至高光谱图像去噪任务，为高光谱去噪提供了一种灵活、可扩展的即插即用策略。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文针对压缩传感光片显微镜中的体积重建问题，提出了一种即插即用框架，可灵活集成任意去噪器，并且通过轴向耦合模型利用切片间相关性。虽然应用领域不同，但该框架作为通用的图像/体积重建去噪方法，在方法论上可直接迁移至高光谱图像去噪任务，为高光谱去噪提供了一种灵活、可扩展的即插即用策略。
